definition: to talk about someone or something in a very positive way so that people are impressed with them
to give someone money so that they do not act against you
to pay money to your business partner so that you can control all of a business you previously owned together
to find or see someone or something when you did not expect to
laugh a lot or make someone laugh a lot
try to make people support you or buy something from you
hide a problem or disagreement rather than finding a satisfactory solution to it
help a government system organisation etc continue to exist especially by providing financial or military support
state officially how something should be done
trick someone into believing something that is not true
discuss something in a general way and without dealing with the most important issues
make something such as a statement or newspaper article less offensive powerful or detailed
decide that someone or something will not succeed and stop giving them your attention and energy
